hooks.command: python3 -c 'import yfinance, requests' 2>/dev/null || { pip3 install -q -r "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/requirements.txt" 2>/dev/null || pip3 install -q --user --break-system-packages -r "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/requirements.txt" 2>/dev/null; python3 -c 'import yfinance, requests' 2>/dev/null || echo "[atlas] Could not auto-install Python deps (yfinance, requests) - briefs will fail until they are present. Fix manually: pip3 install --break-system-packages -r '$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/requirements.txt'"; }
